title: Learning Hub Dashboard
description: A student-facing dashboard that tracks course progress, displays learning milestones, and surfaces personalized recommendations — rebuilt from a Google Sheets prototype into a polished React application.

metrics.headline: Reduced student lookup time by 60%
items: Filterable by course, grade, and status

problem: Student progress was scattered across multiple Google Sheets with no unified view. Teachers spent significant time manually cross-referencing data to identify struggling students.
solution: Built a React dashboard that consolidates student data into an interactive, filterable interface with progress visualizations, trend charts, and at-a-glance status indicators.

title: Admin Kanban Dashboard
description: A drag-and-drop workflow board for school administrators to manage tasks, track projects, and coordinate team activities — transformed from a spreadsheet-based system into an interactive React app.

metrics.headline: Streamlined admin workflows by 40%
items: Task detail modals with rich metadata

problem: Administrative task tracking relied on shared spreadsheets with no visual workflow. Tasks fell through the cracks and priorities were unclear.
solution: Created a Kanban board with drag-and-drop columns, task cards with metadata, and visual workflow stages. Mock data simulates a realistic school administration environment.

title: Assessment Grading App
description: A rubric-based grading tool with score calculation, grade distribution charts, and performance analytics — evolved from manual grading sheets into an interactive assessment platform.
problem: Grading was done on paper rubrics, then manually entered into spreadsheets. No visibility into grade distributions or student performance trends.
solution: Built a grading interface with interactive rubrics, automatic score calculation, and rich chart visualizations for grade distributions and performance trends over time.
